title: NURSING NOOK - 211info
text: DAISY CHAIN NURSING NOOK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a location for new parents, caregivers or lactating people to get chest/breastfeeding support and information from an International Board Certified Lactation Consultant (IBCLC) and peers. Also a drop in space to nurse, change diapers, and connect with other parents and caregivers 1270 Charnelton Street Daisy's Place 2nd Floor Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Expectant families, through birth or adoption. Recommended for babies age 2 weeks and older. Hours: Varies Email (541) 505-1139 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 505-1139 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information or to view the calendar and schedule FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - FULL SPECTRUM DOULA SUPPORT HUMAN REPRODUCTION - LACTATION AND FEEDING SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - DANDELION STREET TEAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - MUSIC CLASSES/BABY POP MUSIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DAISY CHAIN
